name: 1959 City School Sour Cream Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup butter, softened at room temperature
1 cup sour cream, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the all-purpose flour, wheat flour, baking soda, and baking powder.
2. In another bowl, cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Beat in the egg and vanilla extract.
3. Gradually add half of the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, stirring just until combined.
4. Blend in the sour cream, then stir in the remaining dry ingredients.
5. Pour half of the batter into a 10-inch tube pan. Sprinkle with half of the topping mix.
6. Spread the remaining batter over the top and sprinkle with the rest of the topping.
7. Bake at 350°F for 40 to 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
TOPPING: In a medium bowl, combine flour, brown sugar, salt, and chopped walnuts. Add butter in small pieces and rub into the mixture with your fingertips until crumbly. Be careful not to overmix.
